hero.sub: Thola inombolo yocingo evikelekile yamahhala ongayisebenzisa ukushayela nokuthumela imiyalezo emhlabeni wonke nge-Wi-Fi noma ngedatha. Jabulela ukuvikelwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni, imiyalezo ephambayo, nokushayela kwezwi/ividiyo kwe-HD — ngezinsiza ezakhelwe ngaphakathi ezikusiza ukuthi uhlale uxhumekile ngaphesheya kwemingcele.

esim.title: eSIM
esim.heading: Seta i-eSIM yakho

esim.body: Dala noma uvule ikhodi yakho ye-QR ye-eSIM bese ulandela imiyalelo yokuvula efoni yakho.
esim.readyBody: I-eSIM yakho isilungile. Ungavula ikhodi ye-QR noma uqhubeke nokuphatha uhlelo lwakho lwedatha yeselula.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.errorReserve: Akwenzeki ukubhuka i-eSIM. Sicela uzame futhi.

esim.installSubtitle: Faka i-eSIM yakho ukuze uqale ukusebenzisa iphakethe lakho ledatha.
esim.invalidInstallLink: Le eSIM ayikakabi nesixhumanisi esivumelekile sokufaka.
esim.installDirectlyOrUseDetails: Faka ngqo kule iPhone, noma usebenzise imininingwane yokuvula engezansi kwenye idivayisi esekelwayo.
esim.noValidInstallLink: Umhlinzeki wakho akanikanga isixhumanisi esivumelekile sokufaka okwamanje. Ungasasebenzisa imininingwane yokusebenzisa ngesandla engezansi lapho itholakala khona.
esim.installationSupportText: Izinyathelo zokufaka i-eSIM zingahluka ngokuya ngedivayisi. Qiniseka ukuthi i-iPhone yakho ivuliwe futhi iyahambisana ne-eSIM ngaphambi kokuyifaka. Uma ukufakwa okuqondile kungatholakali, sebenzisa imininingwane yokuvula ekhonjiwe ngenhla ku-Izilungiselelo > Ukuselula > Yongeza i-eSIM.
esim.localSubtitle: Ukuhlinzekwa kwenkonzo ezweni lakho lamanje noma ekusetshenzisweni kwasekhaya okuseduze.
esim.europeSubtitle: Ukuhlinzekwa kwezinsiza kwezindawo kulo lonke iYurophu.
esim.heavyUsageDescription: Okungcono kakhulu ekusetshenzisweni okuningi, ekusakazeni, nasekungakhathazeki ngemikhawulo yedatha.
esim.local3gbDescription: Kuhle kakhulu ezihambweni ezimfushane nasekubhrawuzeni okulula.
esim.local5gbDescription: Kuhle kakhulu ekuhambeni, ekuthumeleni imilayezo, emephini, nasekusetshenzisweni kwansuku zonke.
esim.local10gbDescription: Kuhle kakhulu ekusetshenzisweni okuqinile kohambo nasekusakazeni.
esim.local20gbDescription: Idatha ephezulu kakhulu yokuhamba okude nokusetshenziswa okuningi.
esim.localUnlimitedDescription: Idatha engenamkhawulo yabahambi abangafuni ukukhathazeka ngokusetshenziswa.

upgrade.title: Khuphula izinga
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Qala ngohlelo lwethu lwamahhala oluxhaswa izikhangiso. Susa izikhangiso ngo-Plus, noma uvule zonke izici ezinamandla ngo-Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Khetha uhlelo lwe-app, engeza amaphakheji edatha ngawe, noma wabelane ngedatha nomndeni wakho — konke endaweni eyodwa.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Start with our free, ad-supported plan. Go ad-free with Plus, or unlock full power features with Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Add global eSIM data so Chatforia keeps working even when you’re away from Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Create a shared data pool for your family and manage everyone’s usage from one place.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Vula izici zamandla futhi ususe izikhangiso.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (amaphakheji edatha ye-eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Engeza idatha yomhlaba wonke ukuze i-Chatforia iqhubeke isebenza ngisho ngaphandle kwe-Wi-Fi. Amanani alungiswa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokususelwa ezweni lakho nasemalini yakho.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick a one-time global data pack so Chatforia keeps working when you’re traveling or away from Wi-Fi.

features.throttle: Idatha esheshayo ephansi kwemigomo yokusetshenziswa ngokulingana nokuphathwa kwenethiwekhi

unlimited.title: Iphakethe elingenamkhawulo

disclaimer.devices: Amaphakheji edatha we-eSIM adinga idivayisi ehambisana ne-eSIM futhi evulekile. Ukutholakala kuhluka ngokuya ngemodeli yocingo, umhlinzeki wenethiwekhi, kanye nezwe. Ukumbozwa kanye nezivinini kuhluka ngokuya ngendawo.
disclaimer.fairUse: Idatha esheshayo ingase ibhekane nemikhawulo yokusetshenziswa okufanele, nezimo zenethiwekhi yasendaweni, kanye nokutholakala kwayo esifundeni.

why.title: Kungani abantu bethuthela ku-Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia ikunikeza inombolo yocingo yangempela, ukuguqulwa okuhlakaniphile, kanye nendlela ecacile yokusebenzisa ngaphandle kwezikhangiso uma usukulungele.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Izikhangiso ezilula ku-Free, ukuthuthukiswa okulula kwe-Plus uma usukulungele, kanye namathuluzi e-Premium angawanikezwa yi-TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia noGoogle Voice
voice.body: Uhlelo lokusebenza lwesimanje, umklamo wokuqala womhlaba wonke, nokuhumusha okwakhelwe ngaphakathi esikhundleni sokudlulisela izingcingo sendlela yakudala.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs izinhlelo zokuxoxa
messengers.body: Thumela imiyalezo ngenombolo yocingo yangempela — hhayi nje kubasebenzisi be-app abanye — ene-AI nesimo esakhelwe ngaphakathi. Kuhle uma uvela kwezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza ezifana ne-TextFree noma i-TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Ukuqhathanisa kusekelwe kulwazi olutholakala obala futhi kungashintsha ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Ezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza zokuthumela imiyalezo zamahhala ezifana neTextFree noma iTextMe ngokuvamile ziyafana neTextNow.

free.a: Yebo. Uhlelo lwamahhala luqukethe inombolo yeChatforia, ukushayela nokuthumela imiyalezo kunezikhangiso. Ungahlala kuhlelo lwamahhala isikhathi eside njengoba uthanda, noma uthuthukise ukuze ususe izikhangiso futhi uvule izici eziningi.

plusPremium.a: Futhi isusa izikhangiso futhi yandise umlando wemilayezo yakho — ifanele ukusetshenziswa nsuku zonke. I-Premium ingeza izilungiselelo ezengeziwe, amathuluzi e-AI wokubhala kabusha nokuphendula, kanye nokwesekwa okubalulekile kwabasebenzisi abasebenzisa kakhulu.

esim.a: Chatforia Mobile isebenzisa ukumbozwa kwe-eSIM emhlabeni wonke. Ukutholakala kuncike ezweni lakho nasemkhiqizweni wakho. Uzobona izinketho ezisekelwayo ngesikhathi sokuvula ngaphakathi kohlelo lokusebenza.

cancel.q: Ngingakwazi yini ukukhansela noma ukushintsha izinhlelo nganoma yisiphi isikhathi?
cancel.a: Yebo. Ungaphatha noma ukhansele ukubhalisa kwakho ekhasini lokukhokha kuhlelo lokusebenza. Izinguquko zisebenza ekupheleni kwesikhathi sakho samanje sokukhokha.

family.a: Amaphakheji omndeni adala ichibi ledatha elabelwe ama-akhawunti amaningi eChatforia. Umuntu oyedwa ukhokha ibhili, futhi ungamenyisa noma ususe amalungu futhi usethe imingcele kumuntu ngamunye.

account.q: Ngingayidalela kanjani noma ngiyivuselele kanjani i-akhawunti yami?
account.a: Landa uhlelo lokusebenza noma usebenzise iwebhu, thinta "Dala i-akhawunti", qinisekisa i-imeyili/inombolo yakho yocingo. Ukuze ubuyise, sebenzisa "Ngikhohliwe iphasiwedi".

privacy.a: Yebo. Imilayezo nezingcingo zifihlwe ngokuphelele (end-to-end) ngokungagcini. Ungu wedwa nomamukeli ongakwazi ukuzifunda.

translate.a: Vumela "Auto-translate" ku-Settings → Appearance & Language. Sihumusha kudivayisi lapho sekuxhaswa khona, kungenjalo sisebenzisa ama-API avikelekile ane-metadata encane.

contact.a: Sithinte ku-support@chatforia.com. Faka izithombe-skrini kanye nohlelo lwakho lokusebenza inguqulo.

howItWorks.title: Indlela iChatforia esebenza ngayo
howItWorks.intro: I-Chatforia yakhelwe ukwenza ukuxhumana kube lula, kusheshe, futhi kufinyeleleke kalula. Ukuqala kuthatha izinyathelo ezimbalwa nje.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Bhalisa usebenzisa i-imeyili yakho noma igama lomsebenzisi ukuze udale i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Xhumana nabanye ngokukhetha abaxhumana nabo noma ukuqala izingxoxo ezintsha.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Imilayezo iletwa ngokushesha ukuze kunikezwe isipiliyoni sokuxhumana esibushelelezi.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Ukuguqulela okwakhelwe ngaphakathi kusiza abasebenzisi ukuxhumana ngezilimi ezahlukene.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Lawula izintandokazi zakho, abaxhumana nabo, nezilungiselelo zokuxhumana.

safety.title: Ukuvikeleka & Izinkomba Zomphakathi
safety.intro: I-Chatforia izibophezele ekugcineni indawo ephephile nenhlonipho kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Lezi zinkomba zisiza ukuqinisekisa isipiliyoni esihle kubo bonke.
safety.respectDesc: Kulindeleke ukuthi abasebenzisi baxhumane ngokuhlonipha. Ukuhlukunyezwa, ukuxhashazwa, noma ukuziphatha okubucayi akukuvunyelwe.

tools.report: Bika ukuziphatha okungafanele noma okuqukethwe okungafanele
tools.block: Vimba abasebenzisi ukuze uvimbele ukuxhumana okwengeziwe

safety.enforcementDesc: Singathatha izinyathelo maqondana nama-akhawunti aphula lezi zikhokhelo, okuhlanganisa izixwayiso, izithiyo, noma ukususwa unomphela epulatifomu.

whyMessaging.title: Kungani amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo ebaluleke kakhulu kunanini ngaphambili
whyMessaging.intro: Amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo sekuyizinsiza ezibaluleke kakhulu zokuxhumana emhlabeni wanamuhla. Kusukela ezingxoxweni zomuntu siqu kuya ekuxhumaneni kwebhizinisi, izinhlelo zokusebenza zokuthumela imilayezo zivumela abantu ukuthi bahlale bexhumene ngokushesha nangempumelelo.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Abantu bathembele kuhlelo lokuthumela imilayezo ukuze baxhumane nsuku zonke nabangane, nomndeni, nabalingani emsebenzini. Noma ngabe kuwukwazisa okusheshayo noma ingxoxo ende, ukuthumela imilayezo kunikeza indlela elula futhi eguquguqukayo yokuhlala uxhumene.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Enye yezinzuzo ezinkulu zama-platform okuthumela imilayezo isivinini sawo. Imilayezo iletwa ngokushesha, ivumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane ngesikhathi sangempela. Leli zinga lokunethezeka lenze ukuthumela imilayezo kube yindlela yokuxhumana ekhethwa abantu abaningi.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo axhumanisa abantu emhlabeni wonke. Ngenxa yokufinyelela ku-inthanethi, abasebenzisi bangaxhumana kungakhathalekile indawo abakhona, okwenza kube lula ukwakha ubudlelwano nokusebenzisana emazweni ngamazwe.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Amapulatifomu wesimanje wokuthumela imilayezo agxile ekunikezeni abasebenzisi ukulawula idatha yabo nezingxoxo zabo. Izici ezifana nokufihlwa kwemilayezo, izilungiselelo zobumfihlo, nezilawuli zemilayezo zivumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane ngokuzethemba.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Ukuthumela imilayezo kuyaqhubeka nokuthuthuka ngezinye izici ezintsha ezifana nezimpendulo ezisebenzisa i-AI, ukuhumusha, nokwabelana ngokuqukethwe okuhlukahlukene. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka nokuthuthuka, amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo azoba namandla kakhulu futhi azohlukahluka kakhulu.
whyMessaging.outro: I-Chatforia yakhiwe ngale migaqo engqondweni, inikeza isipiliyoni sokuthumela imilayezo esheshayo, ephephile, futhi elula ukuyisebenzisa emhlabeni oxhumene.

global.title: Ikusasa Lokuxhumana Komhlaba Wonke
global.intro: Ukuxhumana sekuthuthuke ngokushesha emashumini eminyaka ambalwa edlule. Lokho okwakudinga izingcingo noma imihlangano ubuso nobuso manje sekungenziwa ngokushesha ngezinkundla zokuthumela imilayezo. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka nokuthuthuka, ukuxhumana emhlabeni wonke kuya ngokushesha, kuya ngokufinyeleleka kalula, futhi kuya ngokubandakanya wonke umuntu.
global.barriersDesc: Enye yezinguquko ezinkulu kakhulu ekuxhumaneni ukuncishiswa kwezithiyo zendawo. Abantu manje bangaxhumana nabanye emhlabeni wonke cishe ngesikhathi sangempela. Noma ngabe ezingxoxweni zomuntu siqu, ebhizinisini, noma ekubambisaneni, amapulatifomu wokuthumela imilayezo enze ukuthi ibanga lingabi yisithiyo esikhulu.
global.translationDesc: Ulimi ngokwesiko beluhlala luyisithiyo esikhulu kakhulu ekuxhumaneni komhlaba wonke. Namuhla, amathuluzi okuhumusha afakwe ngaphakathi asiza ukuvala leli gobe. Amapulatifomu afana neChatforia avumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane kalula noma ngabe bakhuluma izilimi ezahlukene, edala amathuba amasha okuxhumana nokuqonda.
global.realtimeDesc: Ijubane liyisici esibalulekile esibumba ukuxhumana kwanamuhla. Abasebenzisi balindele ukuthi imilayezo ihanjiswe ngokushesha, futhi ingqalasizinda yanamuhla isekela lokho okulindelekile. Ukuthumela imilayezo ngesikhathi sangempela kuvumela izingxoxo zemvelo neziguquguqukayo.
global.privacyDesc: Njengoba ukuxhumana sekuyidijithali kakhulu, ubumfihlo nokuphepha kuya kubaluleka kakhulu. Abasebenzisi bafuna ukuqiniseka ukuthi izingxoxo zabo zivikelwe. Izici ezifana nokufihla imininingwane (encryption) nezilungiselelo ezilawulwa ngumsebenzisi zisiza ukunikeza isipiliyoni sokuxhumana esiphephile kakhulu.
global.futureDesc: Ikusasa lokuxhumana komhlaba wonke kungenzeka libe namathuluzi athuthukile, njengokuthumela imilayezo ngosizo lwe-AI, ukuhumusha okuthuthukisiwe, kanye nezipiliyoni zabasebenzisi ezithuthukisiwe. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka bukhula, ukuxhumana kuzoqhubeka kuba lula ukuqonda futhi kufinyeleleke kalula.
global.outro: Amapulatifomu afana neChatforia ayingxenye yalolu shintsho, asiza abantu baxhumane kalula ngokwezilimi nangemiphetho.

index.title: Ibhulogi yeChatforia
index.intro: Hlola ukuqonda ngokuxhumana, ukuphepha ku-inthanethi, nokuthi ubuchwepheshe bokuthumela imilayezo buxhumanisa kanjani abantu emhlabeni wonke.

chatSafely.title: Ungaxoxa kanjani ngokuphepha ku-inthanethi
chatSafely.intro: Ukuxhumana ku-inthanethi sekwenze kwaba lula kunanini ukuhlangana nabantu emhlabeni wonke. Noma ngabe uthumela imilayezo kubangane, uhlangana nabantu abasha, noma usebenzisana ngobungcweti, amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo adlala indima enkulu ekuphileni kwansuku zonke. Nokho, ukuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi kubalulekile njengokuhlala uxhumekile.

personalInfo.title: Vikela ulwazi lwakho siqu
personalInfo.body: Enye yemithetho ebaluleke kakhulu yokuphepha ku-inthanethi wukugwema ukwabelana ngolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu olubucayi. Lokhu kuhlanganisa ikheli lakho lasekhaya, imininingwane yakho yezimali, amaphasiwedi, noma yiluphi ulwazi olungakusiza ukukuhlonza olungase lusetshenziswe kabi. Ngisho nasezingxoxweni ezingajwayelekile, kungcono ukuqaphela ukuthi yini oyabelana ngayo nokuthi ubabelana nobani.

safetyFeatures.title: Sebenzisa izici zokuphepha ezakhelwe ngaphakathi
safetyFeatures.body: Amapulatifomu wesimanje wokuthumela imilayezo afana neChatforia anikeza amathuluzi okusiza abasebenzisi ukuthi bahlale bephephile. Izici ezifana nokuvimba, ukubika, nokulawula ubumfihlo zakhelwe ukunikeza abasebenzisi ukulawula okuhlangenwe nakho kwabo. Uma umuntu ezenza ngendlela engafanele noma ekwenza ungakhululekile, kufanele usebenzise lawa mathuluzi ngokushesha.

scams.title: Qaphela ukuqhwaga
scams.body: Abakhohlisi bavame ukusebenzisa amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo ukuze bakhohlise abasebenzisi ukuthi babelane ngolwazi lwabo siqu noma bathumele imali. Qaphela imilayezo ebonakala imihle kakhulu ukuze kube yiqiniso, njengeminikelo engalindelekile, izicelo eziphuthumayo, noma izixhumanisi ongaziqondi. Hlala uqinisekisa ubunikazi bomuntu okhuluma naye ngaphambi kokuthatha noma yiziphi izinyathelo.

responsibly.title: Xhumana ngokuziphatha
responsibly.body: Ukuxhumana ngenhlonipho kusiza ukudala indawo ephephile kubo bonke. Gwema ukubamba iqhaza ezingxoxweni eziyingozi noma ezihlambalazayo, futhi qaphela ukuthi amazwi akho angaba namuphi umthelela kwabanye. Ukusebenzisana okuhle kunikela ekuhlangenwe nakho okungcono kubo bonke abasebenzisi.

whySafety.title: Kungani ukuphepha ku-inthanethi kubalulekile
whySafety.body: Njengoba ukuxhumana kwedijithali kuqhubeka kukhula, ukugcina ukuphepha nokwethenjwa kuba kubaluleke kakhulu. Ngokulandela izindlela eziyisisekelo zokuphepha nokusebenzisa amathuluzi atholakalayo, abasebenzisi bangazuza izinzuzo zokuthumela imilayezo ngenkathi banciphisa ubungozi.

chatSafely.conclusion: Ukuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi akudingi ulwazi lobuchwepheshe olunzulu—kudinga nje ukuqaphela, ukucophelela, nokwahlulela okuhle. Ngezindlela ezifanele, ungaxhumana ngokuzethemba nangokuphepha.

about.title: Mayelana ne-Chatforia
about.description: I-Chatforia iyinhlelo yokuthumela imiyalezo ephephile, esekelwe ezilimini eziningi, enokufihlwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni (E2E), ukuhumusha ngokushesha, kanye nokubiza ngomsindo/ividiyo. Injongo yethu ilula: ukusiza abantu baxhumane—ngokuphepha, ngasese, nangaphezu kwezilimi.

values.privacy: Ukuqinisekisa ubumfihlo kuqala: Ukuvalwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni (E2E) ngokujwayelekile.
values.access: Ukufinyelela kubo bonke: Ukuguqulela ngokuzenzakalelayo izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100.
values.control: Ukulawula: Imilayezo ephunyayo kanye nezitifiketi zokufundwa kuyinketho.
values.access_aria: Ukufinyelela kubo bonke: Ukushintshisa ngokuzenzakalela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100.
values.control_aria: Ukulawula: Imilayezo ephunyayo nezitifiketi zokufunda azimanyalali.

about.howDescription:
Imilayezo ibethwa kudivayisi yakho ngaphambi kokuba iphume kuyo.
Ukuguqulela, ukugcinwa kwedatha, nokuvumelanisa amadivayisi kuhlelwe ukunciphisa lokho amaseva ethu angakubona.
about.privacyDesc: Ukubethela kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni nezilawuli zobumfihlo zakhelwe ngaphakathi ku-Chatforia kusukela ekuqaleni.
about.accessDesc: I-Chatforia isiza abantu baxhumane ngaphezu kwezilimi, amadivayisi, nemingcele.
about.controlDesc: Khetha ukuthi imilayezo ibukeka kanjani, nini lapho inyamalala khona, nokuthi i-akhawunti yakho ihlala ivikelekile kanjani.

press.title: Cindezela
press.boilerplateBody: I-Chatforia uhlelo lokuthumela imilayezo oluqala ngobumfihlo olwenza ingxoxo phakathi kwezilimi zibe lula. Imilayezo ivikelwe kusukela ekuqaleni iye ekugcineni futhi i-app inesixhaso sokuhumusha esakhelwe ngaphakathi esisekela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100 ngesikhathi sangempela. Abasebenzisi bangavumela imilayezo inyamalale, bagcine ukuthola ubufakazi bokufunda kuyinketho, futhi bahlanganise imilayezo kumadivayisi ahlukene. Iyatholakala ku-iOS, Android, naku-webhu.
press.scanTip: Kwi-desktop? Skena ngocingo lwakho ukuze uthole uhlelo lokusebenza.

careers.title: Imisebenzi
careers.intro: Siyithimba elincane elisungulayo elakha i-Chatforia — umlayezo wangasese womhlaba wonke oqala kuwebhu, ku-iOS, naku-Android. Uma ukhathalela ubumfihlo, ukufihlwa kwemininingwane, kanye nezipiliyoni zabasebenzisi ezimnandi, singathanda ukuzwa kuwe.
careers.openRoles: Izindima zokungena ekusunguleni: Umholi we-Full-stack Engineer, i-Backend Engineer (Node.js), Umkhandi we-Frontend/Web (React), Umkhandi we-Mobile (iOS), Umkhandi we-Mobile (Android), Umkhandi we-DevOps/SRE, Umkhandi Wezokuphepha Nokufihla Idatha, Umkhandi Wezokuxhumana (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Ungafaka kanjani isicelo: Sebenzisa inkinobho engezansi ukuthumela i-imeyili eneresume yakho nezixhumanisi.
careers.whyBullets:
• Siza ukwakha isisekelo somlayezo womhlaba wonke omusha.
• Thumela izithuthukisi ezisetshenziswa kuwebhu, ku-iOS, naku-Android.
• Sebenza ngqo nomseki ekwakhiweni nasekuqondiseni umkhiqizo.

sms.title: Amanombolo weselula ne-SMS
sms.body:
Uma ukhetha ukuhlinzeka inombolo yocingo ephathekayo, siyisebenzisa ukuvumela izici ezifana nokuqinisekisa i-akhawunti, izaziso zokungena, nokuthumela imilayezo kusuka kumsebenzisi kuya kumsebenzisi nge-SMS lapho sekuxhaswa khona. Singathumela imilayezo ye-SMS yokuthengiselana ehlobene ne-akhawunti yakho nemisebenzi yakho ku-Chatforia. Ungakhetha ukungatholi imilayezo ye-SMS nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokuphendula ngokugama elisekelwayo lokuphuma (njenge-"STOP") noma ngokushintsha izintandokazi zakho zezaziso kuhlelo lokusebenza. Asikwazi
thengisa inombolo yakho yocingo noma ukuyisebenzisa ekumaketheni okungahlangene.

sms.title: Ukuxhumana nge-SMS
sms.body: Uma unikeza inombolo yocingo ephathekayo, uyavuma ukuthi i-Chatforia ingakuthumelela imilayezo ye-SMS ehlobene ne-akhawunti yakho nokusetshenziswa kwesevisi, njengokwaziswa kokungena, izaziso zokuphepha, nemilayezo ehlobene nezingxoxo ozisungulayo noma ozihlanganyela kuzo. Asisebenzisi i-SMS ukuthumela imilayezo yokuphromotha noma yokumaketha ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacile. Izindleko ezijwayelekile zemilayezo nedatha zingase zisebenze. Ungaphuma kuzimemo ze-SMS noma kunini ngokuphendula ngokugama elisekelwayo lokuphuma (isb., "STOP") noma ngokuvuselela izilungiselelo zakho zezaziso kuhlelo lokusebenza.

Imilayezo ejwayelekile ifaka amakhodi okungena nokuqinisekisa, izaziso zokulethwa kwemilayezo, izaziso zokuphepha, nezibuyekezo ze-akhawunti zokuthengiselana.

ios.try_a_different_username_contact_name_or: Zama igama lomsebenzisi ehlukile, igama lokuxhumana, noma inombolo yocingo ehlukile.
ios.try_searching_for_a_different_name_or_me: Zama ukusesha igama elihlukile noma umlayezo.
ios.unlock_additional_chatforia_themes_tones: Vula izindikimba ezengeziwe ze-Chatforia, izitayela zomphendulwano, nezici zokwenza ngezifiso nge-Premium.
ios.unlock_personalization_ai_tools_and_adva: Vula ukwenza ngezifiso, amathuluzi e-AI, nezici ezithuthukisiwe ze-Chatforia.
ios.upgrade_to_premium_to_keep_your_number_p: Yenza ukuvuselelwa uye ku-Premium ukuze inombolo yakho ivikelwe ekuphindweni.
ios.usage_details_will_appear_once_your_data: Imininingwane yokusetshenziswa izovela uma iphakethe lakho ledatha selisebenza.
ios.use_this_backup_later_if_this_device_is_: Sebenzisa leli khopi yesipele kamuva uma le divayisi ilahlekile, yashintshwa, noma yamiswa kabusha.
ios.use_this_tab_only_for_existing_chatforia: Sebenzisa leli thabhu kuphela kubasebenzisi abakhona be-Chatforia.
ios.we_don_t_sell_data_packs_under_3_gb: Asidayisi amaphakheji edatha angaphansi kuka-3 GB.
ios.you_can_start_a_new_conversation_save_co: Ungaqala ingxoxo entsha, ugcine abaxhumana nabo, bese ubuya lapha kamuva ukuze ubuyekeze izilungiselelo zakho.
ios.your_carrier_hasn_t_provided_a_valid_ins: Umhlinzeki wakho akanikanga isixhumanisi esivumelekile sokufaka okwamanje. Ungasasebenzisa imininingwane yokusebenzisa ngesandla engezansi lapho itholakala khona.
ios.your_number_may_be_released_in_days_day_: Inombolo yakho ingase ikhishwe ngemva kwezinsuku
ios.esim_data_packs_require_an_esim_compatib: Amaphakheji edatha we-eSIM adinga idivayisi ehambisana ne-eSIM futhi evulekile. Ukutholakala kuhluka ngokuya ngemodeli yocingo, umhlinzeki wenethiwekhi, kanye nezwe. Ukumbozwa kanye nezivinini kuhluka ngokuya ngendawo.
ios.esim_installation_steps_can_vary_by_devi: Izinyathelo zokufaka i-eSIM zingahluka ngokuya ngedivayisi. Qiniseka ukuthi i-iPhone yakho ivuliwe futhi iyahambisana ne-eSIM ngaphambi kokuyifaka. Uma ukufakwa okuqondile kungatholakali, sebenzisa imininingwane yokuvula ekhonjiwe ngenhla ku-Izilungiselelo > Ukuselula > Yongeza i-eSIM.
ios.ria_unavailable_strict_e2ee: URia akatholakali ngenkathi i-Strict E2EE ivuliwe.
ios.ria_took_too_long: URia uthathe isikhathi eside kakhulu ukuphendula.
ios.ria_billing_not_set_up: URia akakatholakali okwamanje ngoba ukukhokhisa kwe-AI akukakayilungiswa.
ios.add_contacts_manually_import_from_phone_: Engeza abaxhumana nabo ngesandla, bawangenise ocingweni lwakho, noma uqale ingxoxo entsha.
ios.contact_does_not_support_video_calls: Lokhu okuxhumana nakho akusekeli izingcingo zevidiyo.

ios.try_different_username_contact_or_phone: Zama igama lomsebenzisi ehlukile, igama lokuxhumana, noma inombolo yocingo ehlukile.
ios.search_by_username_contact_or_phone: Sesha ngegama lomsebenzisi, ngegama lokuxhumana, noma ngenombolo yocingo.
ios.stay_connected_when_youre_traveling_or_a: Hlala uxhumekile uma uhamba noma ukude ne-Wi-Fi.
